briefs.title: BC Cancer Facility Rules Updated; No New Obligations for Most Businesses
briefs.summary: BC updated its hospital insurance rules to modernize the definition of 'BC Cancer' and 'cancer therapy facilities,' clarifying which facilities can provide outpatient cancer treatment to eligible residents. A minor wording change also updates a reference from 'Her Majesty's' to 'His Majesty's' armed forces to reflect the current monarch.
